replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from Pinterest.

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: A date in the format YYYY-MM-DD. If not set, defaults to 89 days ago.

custom_description: Connector for the Pinterest API v5, enabling access to Pinterest advertising and content management data. Supports reading ad accounts, boards, campaigns, ad groups, ads, board sections, board pins, catalogs, catalog feeds, catalog product groups, audiences, conversion tags, customer lists, and keywords.
supported_questions:
- List all my Pinterest ad accounts
- List all my Pinterest boards
- Show me all campaigns in my ad account
- List all ads in my ad account
- Show me all ad groups in my ad account
- List all audiences for my ad account
- Show me my catalog feeds
- Which campaigns are currently active?
- What are the top boards by pin count?
- Show me ads that have been rejected
- Find campaigns with the highest daily spend cap
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new Pinterest board
- Update a campaign budget
- Delete an ad group
- Post a new pin
- Show me campaign analytics or performance metrics

fields.name: country
fields.description: Country associated with the ad account

fields.name: created_time
fields.description: Timestamp when the ad account was created (Unix seconds)

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the ad account

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Owner details of the ad account

fields.name: permissions
fields.description: Permissions assigned to the ad account

fields.name: updated_time
fields.description: Timestamp when the ad account was last updated (Unix seconds)

fields.name: board_pins_modified_at
fields.description: Timestamp when pins on the board were last modified

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the board was created

fields.name: pin_count
fields.description: Number of pins on the board

fields.name: is_flexible_daily_budgets
fields.description: Whether flexible daily budgets are enabled

fields.name: lifetime_frequency_cap
fields.description: Max impressions per user in 30 days

fields.name: is_pin_deleted
fields.description: Whether the original pin is deleted

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the board section

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the pin was created

fields.name: dominant_color
fields.description: Dominant color from the pin image

fields.name: has_been_promoted
fields.description: Whether the pin has been promoted

fields.name: is_owner
fields.description: Whether the current user is the owner

fields.name: is_standard
fields.description: Whether the pin is a standard pin

fields.name: link
fields.description: URL link associated with the pin

fields.name: parent_pin_id
fields.description: Parent pin ID if this is a repin

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the catalog was created

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the catalog was last updated

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the feed was created

fields.name: location
fields.description: URL where the feed is available

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the feed was last updated

fields.name: is_featured
fields.description: Whether the product group is featured
